strengths: Broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Founder of an open-source geospatial platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: Title and scope are Senior/Staff-level, not Director-level individual contributor
Limited demonstrated AI/ML product or platform expertise relative to role expectations
No advanced degree and no clear cloud-architecture leadership at strategic-customer scale

key_factors.factor: Years of engineering experience and breadth
Director-level IC and strategic advisory track record

response.justification: The candidate brings roughly 15 years of broad software engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative through GISCollective, and recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. However, the profile reads as a Senior/Staff full-stack engineer rather than a Director-level IC, with limited evidence of recognized AI expertise, large-scale cloud platform strategy, or advising strategic customers and partners at the level this Principal Engineer role requires.
